records.title: SportsLabResearch-Rugby7-Referee-Physical-Fatigue-Analyzer
records.description:
SportsLabResearch-Rugby7-Referee-Physical-Fatigue-Analyzer v0.1.0-alpha

First public alpha release of the SportsLabResearch-Rugby7-Referee-Physical-Fatigue-Analyzer.

This software has been developed to analyse the physical demands and accumulated fatigue of Rugby Sevens referees using data obtained from wearable tracking systems.

Main features

  • Analysis of one, several or all referees.
  • Match-by-match physical performance analysis.
  • Longitudinal fatigue assessment across tournaments.
  • Automatic generation of scientific reports in Microsoft Word.
  • Automatic export of summary datasets to Microsoft Excel.
  • High-quality graphical visualisations.
  • Heatmap generation for physical load metrics.
  • Two operating modes:
    • Identified analysis.
    • Privacy-preserving anonymised analysis (REF001, REF002...).

This release represents the first modular version of the SportsLabResearch ecosystem, providing a reproducible and extensible framework for referee performance analysis.

Developed by SportsLabResearch

University of Murcia (Spain)

records.title: SportsLabResearch/SportsLabResearch-BloodPressure-Analyzer: SportsLabResearch-BloodPressure-Analyzer v1.0.0
records.description:
SportsLabResearch-BloodPressure-Analyzer v1.0.0

First stable release.

Features

  • Resting blood pressure analysis.
  • Automatic baseline calculation.
  • ESH 2023 interpretation.
  • Excel connector.
  • CSV connector.
  • Clinical dashboard.
  • Word report.
  • Excel report.
  • Scientific documentation.
  • GitHub Pages documentation.

Scientific framework

European Society of Hypertension (ESH) 2023 Guidelines.

Author

José Pino-Ortega

SportsLabResearch

records.title: SportsLabResearch-WIMU-DataExtractor: SportsLabResearch-WIMU-DataExtractor v1.0.2
records.description:
Added

  • Added a new documents/ directory.
  • Included the Scientific Blueprint document.
  • Included the Scientific Blueprint infographic.
  • Improved project scientific documentation.
  • Updated links to GitHub Pages and Zenodo resources.

Documentation

This release strengthens the project's Open Science ecosystem by integrating scientific documentation with the source code and archived software release.
